mapper.sql: id, source_name, source_type, fetch_type, base_url, rss_url, status, weight, cron_expr, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from tech_briefing_source where status = 'ENABLED' order by weight desc, id asc
select from tech_briefing_source order by weight desc, id asc
select from tech_briefing_source where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.update: update tech_briefing_source set source_name = #{sourceName}, source_type = #{sourceType}, fetch_type = #{fetchType}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, rss_url = #{rssUrl}, status = #{status}, weight = #{weight}, cron_expr = #{cronExpr}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
